name: sodax-tick-keeper
description: AWS Lambda keeper that calls tick() on Sodax LeverageYieldVaults whenever LTV drifts outside the tolerance band, and notifies the Sodax solver when an intent is created.

scripts.package: pnpm run build && cd dist && zip -r ../sodax-tick-keeper.zip . && cd .. && cp -r node_modules sodax-tick-keeper && cd sodax-tick-keeper && zip -ru ../sodax-tick-keeper.zip node_modules && cd .. && rm -rf sodax-tick-keeper
